arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news as the goalkeeper is a major doubt for the Premier League trip to the King Power Stadium.

arts.ttl: Man United hopeful Andre Onana will be fit to start at Leicester despite availability doubts and speculation academy goalkeeper would make his senior debut
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Onana is the only senior keeper available to head coach Ruben Amorim with Altay Bayindir and Tom Heaton missing due to injury.

arts.ttl: Man United are watching striker with 33 G/A this season; he will be a free agent soon
arts.sum: Scoring goals has been the biggest issue at Manchester United this season. Their current attackers; Rasmus Hojlund and Joshua Zirkzee, have both scored a combined five Premier League goals this season. Neither Erik ten Hag nor Ruben Amorim have been able to solve this issue for the Premier League giants. arts.ttl: Man United consider 31-G/A star as “ideal reinforcement”, Arsenal “also interested”
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United are reportedly keen on signing the Nigerian International striker Victor Osimhen at the end of the season. The striker is currently on loan at Turkish club Galatasaray from Napoli. arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils receive 'glowing scouting reports' on record-breaking 17-year-old
arts.sum: Manchester United, Chelsea and Arsenal are supposedly among the clubs keeping a watchful eye on Lille's teenage sensation Ayyoub Bouaddi.

arts.ttl: Who is Dermot Mee? The Man Utd goalkeeper set to start against Leicester
arts.sum: The 22-year-old is set to be thrown into the deep end by head coach Ruben Amorim as Man Utd's senior goalkeepers are all expected to be out for Sunday evening's clash with former interim boss Ruud van Nistelrooy and his Leicester side. Dermot Mee is expected to be given the nod over Man Utd's other academy goalkeepers against Leicester.

arts.ttl: Mason Greenwood's Man Utd reunion, 'confidence' over transfer, 'attitude' frustrations
arts.sum: Former Manchester United forward Mason Greenwood could still lend his former club a helping hand in the transfer market despite seeing his stock dip of late at current club Marseille

arts.ttl: Report: Atletico Madrid join race to sign Man United target with 18 G/A this season
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid and Manchester United are set to battle it out for one of the best strikers in the Premier League. Both the clubs are looking for new options in attack as Antoine Griezmann is likely to leave the club at the end of the season due to his contract expiring in 2026. arts.ttl: Report: Man United defender edging closer to exit after not being a part of Amorim’s plans
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim is set to make some big changes to his squad in the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Transfer status of every Leicester City player ahead of key summer
arts.sum: Having signed a new three-year deal last summer, it doesn’t feel likely that Jannik Vestergaard is going anywhere any time soon. After sealing a January loan move to Sheffield United, Hamza Choudhury's 20-year association with his boyhood club may come to an end this summer, with the Blades having an option to sign him permanently.
